description: Multi-file Node.js app designed to validate JS call graph operation via REACHABLE vs NOT_REACHABLE npm CVEs
_canary_purpose: If node-serialize or semver CVEs show UNKNOWN instead of NOT_REACHABLE, the JS call graph (JSCallGraphCollector) is broken or disabled.

CVE-2021-44906.note: minimist() called in live POST /api/args handler

CVE-2017-5941.failure_symptom: UNKNOWN result means JSCallGraphCollector did not run or failed to trace the import graph

CVE-2022-25883.failure_symptom: UNKNOWN result means JSCallGraphCollector did not run or failed to traverse dead-code islands

validation_rules.description: Both node-serialize and semver must be NOT_REACHABLE
validation_rules.pass: Both CVE-2017-5941 and CVE-2022-25883 show NOT_REACHABLE
validation_rules.fail: Either CVE shows UNKNOWN — JS call graph did not run

validation_rules.description: lodash must be REACHABLE (confirms call graph traces positive paths too)
